death.attack.tconevo.chaos: %1$s was annihilated by %2$s using dark energy
death.attack.tconevo.chaos.item: %1$s was annihilated by %2$s using the dark energy of %3$s
modifier.tconevo.vampiric.description: This weapon drains life energy from enemies to heal its wielder.
modifier.tconevo.executor.description: This weapon deals bonus damage based on the target's missing health.
modifier.tconevo.culling.description: This weapon deals increased damage to enemies with less health than its wielder.
modifier.tconevo.juggernaut.description: This weapon deals increased damage based on its wielder's current health.
modifier.tconevo.overwhelm.description: This weapon deals greater damage to armoured targets.
modifier.tconevo.opportunist.description: This weapon deals increased damage to debuffed targets.
modifier.tconevo.impact_force.descriptio: This weapon deals greater damage at high velocity.
modifier.tconevo.crystalline.flavor: You could buy a very small piano!
modifier.tconevo.crystalline.description: This weapon deals greater damage at higher durability.
modifier.tconevo.corrupting.description: This weapon inflicts increasing wither on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.battle_furor.descriptio: This weapon grants its wielder increasing attack damage on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.luminiferous.descriptio: This weapon reveals the positions of struck enemies.
modifier.tconevo.foot_fleet.flavor: Stay still--I'm trying to shoot you!
modifier.tconevo.foot_fleet.description: This weapon grants a burst of speed to its wielder on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.mortal_wounds.descripti: This weapon reduces the enemy's healing for a duration.
modifier.tconevo.rejuvenating.descriptio: This weapon applies regeneration to attacked targets.
modifier.tconevo.true_strike.description: This weapon pierces through evasion on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.ruination.description: This weapon deals damage scaling with enemy health on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.deadly_precision.descri: This weapon deals greatly increased damage on critical strikes.
modifier.tconevo.relentless.description: This weapon induces a shorter invulnerability period in struck enemies.
modifier.tconevo.thundergod_wrath.descri: This weapon calls down a bolt of lightning upon enemies struck at full health.
modifier.tconevo.purging.description: This weapon has a chance to remove positive buffs on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.staggering.description: This weapon briefly immobilizes enemies on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.chain_lightning.descrip: This weapon's fully-charged attacks have a chance of arcing to nearby enemies.
modifier.tconevo.aftershock.description: This weapon deals additional magical damage on fully-charged hits.
modifier.tconevo.photosynthetic.descript: This tool absorbs sunlight to repair itself.
modifier.tconevo.fertilizing.description: This tool can be used to fertilize crops at a large durability cost.
modifier.tconevo.cascading.description: This tool destroys falling blocks in columns.
modifier.tconevo.modifiable.description: This equipment has additional free modifier slots.
modifier.tconevo.energized.description: This tool consumes an internal energy buffer before durability.
modifier.tconevo.piezoelectric.descripti: This weapon converts damage from fully-charged hits into usable energy.
modifier.tconevo.photovoltaic.descriptio: This tool absorbs sunlight to recharge itself.
modifier.tconevo.fluxed.description: This tool consumes energy before durability.
modifier.tconevo.accuracy.description: This weapon has a chance to pierce through evasion.
modifier.tconevo.bloodbound.description: This tool siphons its user's life essence to prevent damage to itself.
modifier.tconevo.crystalys.flavor: I'm not afraid of the darkness!
modifier.tconevo.crystalys.description: This weapon shatters soul networks to manifest weak blood shards.
modifier.tconevo.sentient.description: This tool consumes demon will to increase its power.
modifier.tconevo.willful.description: This weapon severs the strands of demonic will that bind its enemies.
modifier.tconevo.aura_siphon.description: This weapon converts some damage dealt to bonus mana.
modifier.tconevo.fae_voice.description: This weapon may summon pixies to attack foes.
modifier.tconevo.gaia_wrath.description: This weapon fires damaging beams when swung.
modifier.tconevo.mana_infused.descriptio: This tool repairs itself using mana.
modifier.tconevo.omnipotence.description: This tool defies the will of gods.
modifier.tconevo.condensing.flavor: Try not to think about it.
modifier.tconevo.condensing.description: Slain foes and broken blocks may leave behind a smattering of neutrons.
modifier.tconevo.eternal_density.descrip: This weapon condenses the energy from its strikes into EMC.
modifier.tconevo.evolved.flavor: Balanced, as all things should be.
modifier.tconevo.evolved.description: This tool uses energy and can be upgraded by fusion crafting.
modifier.tconevo.draconic_energy.descrip: This tool has increased energy capacity.
modifier.tconevo.draconic_dig_speed.desc: This tool has increased mining speed.
This weapon deals increased melee damage.
modifier.tconevo.draconic_draw_speed.des: This weapon can be drawn faster.
modifier.tconevo.draconic_arrow_speed.de: This weapon fires shots at higher velocity.
modifier.tconevo.soul_rend.description: This weapon has innate soul-stealing abilities.
modifier.tconevo.reaping.description: This weapon has an additional chance to drop mob souls.
modifier.tconevo.entropic.description: This weapon inflicts increased entropy on energy shields.
modifier.tconevo.primordial.flavor: The magic! It calls to me!
modifier.tconevo.primordial.description: This weapon converts a portion of its damage to chaos damage.
modifier.tconevo.flux_burn.description: This weapon drains energy from armour and deals a portion of it as additional damage.
